Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Heaven’s Glory School]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Unsouled ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 4''' — The Heaven’s Glory School is a school that some refiners have gone on pilgrimage to.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 6''' — The Heaven’s Glory School has lost four disciples to abduction by an outsider seeking their sacred arts.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 9''' — The Heaven's Glory School is represented by a boy wrapped in white and gold.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 11''' — The Heaven's Glory School of Mount Samara wears white and gold and its members wear iron badges.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 12''' — The Heaven’s Glory School has claimed Mount Samara and uses Samara’s ring to gather light aura.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 13''' — The Heaven's Glory School has disciples who wear white and gold uniforms with a red sash.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 13''' — Heaven's Glory School has a hierarchy including lesser initiates and elders.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 14''' — The Heaven’s Glory School buildings are sculpted from riverstone.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 14''' — The Heaven’s Glory School rarely accepts anyone below the Iron stage.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 15''' — The Heaven's Glory School forbids its disciples from killing one another.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 15''' — Disciples in the Heaven's Glory School are allowed to compete against each other for everything.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 15''' — The elders of the Heaven's Glory School only want the strongest disciples and do not care as long as nobody dies.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 16''' — The Heaven's Glory School has various halls and elders.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 16''' — The Heaven's Glory School is a school that Lindon has been tricking his way into.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 17''' — The Heaven's Glory School took Yerin's master's body, sword, and Remnant.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 17''' — The Heaven's Glory School has an elder that Lindon fought.}}

== Soulsmith ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 2''' — The Heaven’s Glory School is a school from which Lindon stole a parasite ring.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 8''' — Yerin once stood against the entire Heaven's Glory School.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 15''' — Yerin engaged in battle with the Heaven’s Glory School.}}

== Blackflame ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 5''' — The Jades of the Heaven's Glory School did something to Yerin's master.}}

== Skysworn ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 12''' — The Heaven's Glory School has treasures.}}

== Underlord ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 22''' — The Heaven's Glory School sent a sacred beast to hunt Kelsa.}}

== Uncrowned ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 1''' — The Heaven's Glory School came to the Wei clan looking for a girl they called the disciple of the Sword Sage.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 1''' — The Heaven's Glory School contains Jades.}}

== Wintersteel ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 1''' — The Heaven’s Glory School is described as a collection of backwards savages who have forgotten nearly everything about the sacred arts.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 1''' — Heaven's Glory School is located near the Ancestor's Tomb.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 1''' — Heaven’s Glory School is located in Sacred Valley.}}

== Bloodline ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 4''' — Lindon has no attachment to the Heaven’s Glory School.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 6''' — The group is moving toward the Heaven’s Glory School.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 6''' — The Heaven’s Glory School consists of smooth rainstone buildings.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 6''' — The Heaven’s Glory School has apprentices with copper, iron, or wooden badges.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 7''' — The Heaven’s Glory School is a school that is willing to negotiate regarding territory.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 7''' — The Heaven’s Glory School covers a large portion of the mountain.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 7''' — The Heaven’s Glory School was gathering Ruler techniques.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 8''' — The Heaven’s Glory School hunted down Lindon's family.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 8''' — The Heaven's Glory School is a group Lindon could fight.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 9''' — The Heaven’s Glory School is more powerful and influential than the Wei clan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 9''' — The Heaven’s Glory School is described as the most wisdom-challenged of the schools.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 10''' — The Heaven’s Glory School is located near the eastern exit from Sacred Valley.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 10''' — The fleet of clouds landed in the Heaven’s Glory School.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 11''' — The Heaven's Glory School is a school that Amon once held a coveted position in.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 11''' — Heaven’s Glory School is a group/institution.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 12''' — The Heaven's Glory School has surrounded the hill.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 13''' — The Heaven’s Glory School planned to keep the Kazan prisoners.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 13''' — Eithan intends to plow through the Heaven�s Glory School.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 15''' — The Heaven's Glory School deactivated their formation.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 15''' — Lindon claims Heaven's Glory School in the absence of its Jades.}}

== Dreadgod ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 21''' — The Heaven’s Glory School is a former site.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
